title: Cystium diphysum

taxonomy: Cystium diphysum is classified as a species of liverwort, a small, non-vascular land plant. It belongs to the class Marchantiopsida and the family Cystodiaceae. At the family level, it's part of the order Marchantiopsida and the division Marchantiophyta. Liverworts are non-vascular plants that do not have a true root system.
